mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{receiverName}, '%') AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{receiverName}, '%') AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM addresses WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{receiverName}, '%') AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE phone = #{receiverPhone} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET is_default = CASE WHEN id = #{addressId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE addresses SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
